Concentration lower in dust disposed offsite in 2002 compared to 2001.

Added lead to the sanitary sewer monitoring program for 2001
Added manganese to sanitary sewer monitoring program in 2002
Shipments of mill scale for recycle will vary from year to year due to stockpiling on site.  Shipments were up in 2002 from 2001
The concentration of substances in dust disposed and quantity of dust vary from year to year.

Concentration of substances in mill scale and quantity of mill scale shipped for recycle varies from year to year.  In addition, mill scale may be stockpiled.  Quantity shipped increased in 2002 over 2001
2002 concentration higher in baghouse dust analysis than previous years

Additional equipment was added to our fume control system in late 1998 which resulted in the capture and disposal of more electric arc furnace dust than in previous years. In 2000, we will be attempting to recycle a portion of this material back into the

In past years,chromium  was reported as a component of slag and mill scale, which were listed as "by-products" shipped off site for recycling. Slag and mill scale meet the qualifications as products, and thus will not be reported in future.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Previous reports were based on stack emission factors and manufacturers data. This year's report is based on actual stack measurements, which showed lower air emission rates than the previous estimates.

Some copper is captured in a part of our fume control system known as a "drop out box". This drop out box was added in late 1998 and accounted for anincrease in material captured in 1999. Starting in 2000, we will be attempting to recycle this drop out bo

Steel making slag and mill scale have been reported in past N.P.R.I. reports as "by-products" shipped for off site recycling. Both of these materialsmeet the qualifications for "products" complete with specifications and saleable markets, and thus will no

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Previous year's emission reports were based on emissin factors and manufacturers data. This years emissions are based on actual stack measurements which showed emission rates to be lower than estimates.
Modifications to the electric arc furnace off gas system were completed inlate 1998.

The lead contained in slag and mill scale was reported in previous years as "by-product" shipped off site for recycling. Slag and mill scale meet thequalifications as "products" in that they have specifications, no release to the environment, and are sold

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Previous reports were based on emission factors and manufacturers data. This year's report is based on actual stack measurements.
Additional pollution control equipment was added to our furnace off gas control system in late 1998, which resulted in a higher capture and disposal of manganese in the electric arc furnace dust.

In past years, manganese has been reported as a "by-product" shipped off site for recycling in slag and mill scale. Slag and mill scale meet the qualifications for products and thus will no longer be reported.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Previous year's stack point releases were based on emission factors and manufacturers data. This year's stack point release is based on actual emission rate stack tests.
Modifcations / improvement were made to our electric arc furnace fume control system in late 1998 which resulted in an increase in the capture / disposal of zinc to off site landfill.

The zinc contained in EAF slag and mill scale has been reported in the past as a "by-product" shipped off site for recycling. Mill scale and slag meet the qualifications as products, and thus will no longer be reported.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Previous reports were based on emission factors or manufacturers data. This year's report is based on actual stack measurements which proved to be lower than the previous estimates.
